predicted_sql: SELECT ds.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SUM(fsf.SCHOOL_GRANT_RECEIVED) AS TOTAL_GRANT FROM DIM_SCHOOL ds JOIN FACT_SCHOOL_FINANCES fsf ON ds.SCHOOL_ID = fsf.SCHOOL_ID WHERE fsf.YEAR_ID = 1 GROUP BY ds.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID ORDER BY TOTAL_GRANT DESC LIMIT 5;
raw_output: SELECT ds.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SUM(fsf.SCHOOL_GRANT_RECEIVED) AS TOTAL_GRANT FROM DIM_SCHOOL ds JOIN FACT_SCHOOL_FINANCES fsf ON ds.SCHOOL_ID = fsf.SCHOOL_ID WHERE fsf.YEAR_ID = 1 GROUP BY ds.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID ORDER BY TOTAL_GRANT DESC LIMIT 5;

question: २०१८ च्या शैक्षणिक वर्षासाठी अद्वितीय शाळा आयडी सूचीबद्ध करा जेथे एकतर शाळेचे संविधान एसएमसी (शाळा व्यवस्थापन समिती) आहे किंवा शाळांना चालू शैक्षणिक वर्षात पाठ्यपुस्तकांचा संपूर्ण संच प्राप्त झाला आहे.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_SCHOOL_GOVERNANCE AS T1 JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T2 ON T1.YEAR_ID = T2.YEAR_ID JOIN FACT_SCHOOL_RESOURCES AS T3 ON T1.SCHOOL_ID = T3.SCHOOL_ID WHERE T2.ACADEMIC_YEAR = '2018' AND (T1.CONSTITUTION_OF_SMC = '1 - Yes' OR T3.SCHOOLS_RECEIVED_FULL_SET_OF_TEXTBOOKS_IN_CURRENT_ACADEMIC_YEAR = '1 - Yes')
